bill_title: Tax Relief for American Families and Workers Act of 2024
description: Expanded child tax credit, restored R&D expensing, extended business interest deductions, increased low-income housing tax credit

Finance & Insurance.reason: Restores business interest deduction and R&D amortization rules favorable to financial firms

Real Estate & Housing.reason: Increases Low-Income Housing Tax Credit allocation by 12.5%

Tech & Telecom.reason: Restores immediate R&D expensing instead of 5-year amortization

Construction & Engineering.reason: Extends 100% bonus depreciation for capital equipment

description: Repealed IRA clean energy tax credits, expanded fossil fuel leasing, blocked methane fee

Energy & Utilities.reason: Expands fossil fuel production tax benefits and blocks methane emissions fee

Healthcare & Pharma.reason: No direct stake but opposition aligned with preserving IRA provisions

Finance & Insurance.reason: Reduces regulatory costs and energy transition compliance burden
